description: 3 decisions about different components — same type but unrelated topics

candidates.content: Chose Ollama over LM Studio for the digest provider because Ollama manages concurrency natively via keep_alive.
Adopted React + Tailwind for the dashboard UI because the team has prior experience with this stack from the OAK project.
Switched from implicit retry to explicit fail-fast for the unknown tool because 90% of failures are permanent state errors.
